title: vanilla hartii
intro: Vanilla hartii, also known as Vanilla planifolia or Vanilla mexicana, is a type of orchid and the primary source of vanilla beans. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to treat nausea, anxiety, and stress due to its high concentration of vanillin and other compounds. The health benefits of Vanilla hartii include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced mood stability. Vanilla hartii can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried flowers or as a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent.
